errorDeletingDirectoryAlert: Deleting '{{dirPath}}' failed. Folder probably not empty.
perspectivesSettingsHelp: Choose which perspectives are available in the perspective switcher. Disabled perspectives stay hidden until you re-enable them here.
perspectivesConfiguredByExtConfig: The available perspectives are configured by your administrator and cannot be changed here.
cannotDisableLastPerspective: At least one perspective must remain enabled.
showUnixHiddenFiles: Show files/folders with a dot(.) in front of the name (e.g. Unix, Linux, OS X hidden files)
showSymbolicLinksInfo: Display symlinks (symbolic/shortcut links) in folder listings, disable to hide them.
checkForNewVersionOnStartup: Check for new version on startup
reorderTags: Enable changing the tag order with drag and drop
prefixTagContainerInfo: In the file name 'file1_[TAG1].txt', '_' is the prefix.
fileNameHelp: File name should be at least one character long and should not contain the following characters: # / \ : * ? " < > |

persistTagsInSidecarFile: Do not rename files on tagging (use sidecar files)

useTrashCan: Move deleted files or folders to trash bin if available
useTrashCanInfo: Files and folders from e.g. S3 buckets will be deleted directly since there is no trash bin support
invalidImportFile: The imported file has invalid format
encryptionRecommended: Encryption is recommended because the selection contains credentials
disableEncryptionWarning: Warning: the export will contain unencrypted credentials
passwordTooWeak: Choose a stronger password: at least 10 characters with mixed character types, or a long passphrase
importFileTooLarge: The selected file is too large to import

sectionInvalidSkipped: Some data in the file was invalid and was skipped

showFilesWithTagsTooltip: Show files or folders tagged with at least one tag from this tag group
deleteTagFromTagGroupContentConfirm: Do you want to delete the tag '{{tagName}}' from the taggroup?

createMarkdownTitle: Creates a text file with simple (markdown based) formatting, recommended for digital notes

deleteConfirmationContent: The selected entries will be permanently deleted. Are you sure?
enableWS: Enable generating thumbnails and search index in separate process
closeButtonDialog: Press ESC to close this dialog

confirmFileTypeDeletion: Do you want to delete this file type?
latestVersion: You are on the latest version of {{productName}}
saveFileBeforeClosingFile: Do you want to save the changes before closing the file?

featureInBetaStatus: This feature is in BETA status

showTags: Show tags for files and folders
readOnlyLocationIndexDisabled: Location is read-only — index cannot be refreshed
linksGraphIndexConfirm: The Links Graph requires full-text indexing with link extraction enabled. This process may take a while depending on the number and size of the files in the location. Do you want to proceed?
readonlyModeSwitch: Open this location in read-only mode
fullTextIndexRequiresPro: PDF and Office formats require Pro.
watchForChangesInLocation: Watch for external changes in this location
tagDelimiterInfo: In the file name file1[TAG1_TAG2].txt , _ is the delimiter.
cannotOpenRemoteOffline: Cannot open this remote location while offline
offlineLocationUnavailable: Network is offline. Remote location load was canceled.
tagTitleHelper: Tags should be at least 1 character long and should not contain: spaces, \, / #
toggleThumbnailModeTitle: Switch between cover and contain thumbnail modes

mustContainTheseTags: Must contain all of these tags
atLeastOneOfTheseTags: At least one of these tags

searchCurrentFolderWithSubFolders: Search in the current folder including subfolders
dndDisabledReadOnlyMode: Importing files is disabled because the location is in read-only mode.
smartTagNowDescription: Adds the current date and time as a tag
smartTagTodayDescription: Adds the current date as a tag
smartTagTomorrowDescription: Adds the date of tomorrow as a tag
smartTagYesterdayDescription: Adds the date of yesterday as a tag'
smartTagMonthDescription: Adds the current year and month as a tag
smartTagYearDescription: Adds the current year as a tag
smartTagGeoDescription: Add custom geographical coordinates as a tag
smartTagDateDescription: Add custom date as a tag
getLatestVersionPro: Please download the latest version from the link in the purchase confirmation email.
noFileButFoldersFound: Some folders found! Turn on the folder visibility from the perspective's toolbar to view them.
dragAndDropToImport: Drag and drop files here to copy or upload them.
localLocation: Local - pointing to a local folder
fileExist: File with the same name already exist
importMacTagsHelp: Experimental feature! Depending on how many tags you have in your current directory, the tag extraction process may take a long time in which the application's user interface may appear as blocked.
pageLimitHelp: Set number of files per page
choosePerspective: Set default perspective for this folder
sharingLinkTooltip: Link for sharing to other TagSpaces installation using the same location IDs
copyLinkToClipboard: Copy the link to the clipboard
downloadLinkTooltip: Link and QR-code for time limited sharing on the Internet
filesLimit: Max. files to be displayed in a folder
scrollFilesLimit: Files to be loaded on scroll down
gobackClarification: Navigate to last opened file, folder or location
extractGeoCoordinates: Extract geo-coordinates from files as tags
thumbAlreadyExists: Thumbnail for '{{directoryName}}' already exists, do you want to override it?
setupTOTPHelp: Setup mutli-factor authentication (MFA) with time-based one-time password (TOTP) generated from auth apps (e.g. Google Authenticator)
verifyTOTPCodeHelp: Scan the QR with an auth app (e.g. Google Authenticator) and enter the generated code here
confirmResetColor: Do you really want to clear this color?
maxIndexAgeHelp: After this time elapses, the search index will be invalidated
savedSearchHelp: Save the current search parameters for a later use of this search
exportCsv: Export current file and folder list as CSV file
serverIsDefaultHelp: Set as Default Map Tile Server
addTileServersHelp: Further map tile servers can be found in the OpenStreetMap documentation
addTileServersSettings: In order to see the map, add at least one map tile server in the settings of the app
tileServerOsmConfirmText: OpenStreetMap is a free, third-party map service operated by the OpenStreetMap Foundation. By using it you accept their terms of use, and requests sent to their servers will be subject to their privacy policy.
noSubFoldersFound: No subfolders in the current folder
ignorePatternsHelp: The search will ignore folders added here
pathNotInCurrentLocation: Ignore pattern path is not in the current location
enableTagsFromLocationHelp: These are tags which are saved in the location's folder, making them visible for other users of this folder
clearFolderColor: Clears the color of this folder
useDefaultTaggingType: Use the default tagging type from the settings
tagsInFilenameExplanation: Uses the name of file for saving the tags - Tagging 'photo.jpg' with a tag 'sunset' will rename it to 'photo[sunset].jpg'
tagsInSidecarFileExplanation: Uses a sidecar file for saving the tags - Tagging 'photo.jpg' with a tag 'sunset' will store this tag in an additional sidecar file called 'photo.jpg.json' located in a sub-folder called '.ts'
tagGroupLocationHelp: Selecting “Tag Library” makes the tag group available only on this TagSpaces installation (or this browser in the web version). Selecting a “Location” stores the tag group in that location, making it available on all devices connected to it.
enterTimePeriodTooltip: Shows only files and folders tagged with date tag pointing to the given time period
storedSearchQueriesTooltip: Stored search queries for later use
filterByLastModifiedDateTooltip: Filter the search result by last modified date
filterBySizeTooltip: Filter the search results by their file size
filterByTypTooltip: Filter the search result by their type
useCurrentIndexTooltip: Will the use the already created search index, if it is not expired
forceReindexTooltip: Will force the re-creation of the search index
searchTypeFuzzyTooltip: Delivers broader search results, tolerating typos in the seach query
searchTypeSemiStrictTooltip: Exact search in file path, description and text content (by enabled full-text search)
searchTypeStrictTooltip: Same as semi-strict but case sensitive
warningOpeningFilesExternally: Show warning on opening files externally
sharingLinkCopied: Link for sharing copied to the clipboard
sharingLinkFailed: Copying the link to clipboard failed
encryptionKeyExplanation: 32 characters long encryption key (SSE type C)
exifGeo: Import EXIF latitude and longitude as geo-tag
exifDateTime: Import EXIF image shooting date and times as date tag
iptcDescription: Import IPTC description as file description
exifDialogExplanation: This functionality will traverse all JPG files from the current folder and import the data from the selected EXIF/IPTC fields as tags
iptcDescriptionWarning: Warning: The extraction of the IPTC description will overwrite existing file descriptions
folderWithCustomPerspectiveSetting: Current folder has custom settings for this perspective
showCurrentFolderContent: Show content of the current folder
showEntriesDescription: Show description for files and folders
linkValidityTooltip: Time for which the link is valid
setRevisionsEnabledHelp: Creates a revision every time a file is saved
removeExtensionTooltip: Are you sure you want to remove '{{extensionName}}' extension?
resolveConflictDesc: For saving your changes as new file click on 'Save As' button, for override the external changes click the 'Override' button.
entriesWillBeCreatedIn: Files and folders will be created in:
noSuitableLocation: Files or folders can't be created. No suitable location found!
errorCORS: The URL can not be access, CORS error
noImagesInFolder: This folder does not contain any images
maxLoops: Limit list objects in a bucket
maxLoopsHelp: The app can handle as much files in one S3-folder as specified in this setting
confirmDialogClosing: Do you want to close this dialog?
fileNameTagSetting: Place of the tags in the filename
fileNameBeginTagPlaceExplanation: Tags will be placed at the beginning of the filename, like this '[tag1 tag2] filename.ext'
fileNameEndTagPlaceExplanation: Tags will be placed at end of the filename, like this 'filename [tag1 tag2].ext'
autoOpenedFilename: File to be opened on navigation to a folder
copyIdToClipboard: Copy entry ID to the clipboard
entryIdTooltip: Entry ID is used for sharing links
searchQueryInfo: Query - see tooltip of the info icon for help
author: Author
title: Title
confirmEncryptionChanged: After changing the encryption key, you won't be able to decrypt files encrypted with the previous key. All new created or uploaded files will be encrypted with the new key. Are you sure you want to continue?
encryptionExplanation: This is an experimental feature, which will encrypt (on the server side) all files created or uploaded with this app. This is not an end to end encryption. If you forget the bucket encryption key, you will loose the content of the encrypted files. Use with caution!
dragMode: Enable dragging files outside of the application
openSharingLink: Open sharing links created with the TagSpaces (ts:// links)
confirmSearchById: Do you want to search for the file or folder by its ID?
generateNewLocationId: Generates new unique identifier for this location
aiHelp: AI model {{chatModel}} can make mistakes. Verify the provided information before using it!
aiChatForFolderDisabled: AI Chat disabled for read-only folders
noLinksFound: No links found for this entry
confirmHistoryDeletion: Do you want to delete the AI-chat history?
doubleClickToSearchForTag: Double-click to search for this tag
fromTagLibrary: Use tags from the tag library
name: Name
limitSummary: Limit the length of the summary
limitSummaryHelp: Used for short or long summary
appendToDescriptionHelp: Append or replace generated text to description
appendAnalysisToDescriptionHelp: Append or replace analysis to description
tsLinksHelp: TagSpaces links begin with ts://? and are used for internal sharing of files and folders
pasteImageFromClipboard: Paste an image from clipboard by pressing
deletePromptConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this prompt?
backgroundColorInfo: The background color will not be visible if you have set a background image
useOnlyTagsFromTagLibrary: Use only tags from tag library for tagging
transferMetaInfo: Transfer corresponding thumbnails and sidecar files containing tags or description
renameDisableTooltip: Exit the file edit mode in order to rename it

noModelsLoaded: Error: No AI-models are loaded, please check if the AI-service is running.
fileModified: File was modified, do you want to save the changes?
indexDisabledConfirm:
Indexing is currently disabled for this location.
Would you like to force a reindex?
tagDelimiterChange: Changing Tag Delimiter will hide current tags with the old delimiter
shortNameMaxLength: Short name should be max. 5 characters
dateTagsGrouping: Group by date tags like 20250607 or 202504

Hide Toolbox

distributed in {{groupCount}} tag groups

madePossibleByTagSpaces: is made possible by the TagSpaces project and other open source software listed in the:
coreExtensionsTooltip: These are extensions which are packaged with the current version of the app
globalShortcutsTooltip: Enables global shortcut for creating new files, file navigation, play/pause audio files or opening the search. Global shortcuts are working even if the app window is not currently in focus or visible.
devModeTooltip: Will enable some experimental features and turn on extra debugging
